workbookTitle: Quick check: did this actually help you move forward?
workbookText: I am actively improving Cofoundery - your feedback helps make the tool genuinely better.
dialogText: I really appreciate your feedback - especially what helped, what felt unclear, and what is still missing.
requiredError: Please answer the first three questions first. They are the most important ones for me.
invalidError: Please check your answers once more.
saveError: Feedback could not be saved right now.

questions.q1: 1. What was the most valuable moment for you in the tool?
questions.q2: 2. Where did it feel unclear or unnecessarily complicated?
questions.q3: 3. What would need to change for you to say: this really helped me?
questions.q4: 4. Where would you want more support?
questions.q5: 5. Is there anything else you would like to tell me?

requiredHint: The first three questions are especially important for me; everything else is optional.

dictation.accepted: Text added. You can keep dictating.
dictation.unsupported: Dictation is not available in this browser.
dictation.unsupportedLong: Dictation is unfortunately not available in this browser.
dictation.startFailed: Recording could not be started right now.
